attacking_style: Rarely initiates attacks; prefers to match moves from GC contenders in final groups. Operates defensively in final climb selections, lacking explosive acceleration to bridge or create gaps.
team_tactics: Team uses domestiques (MÄDER, PADUN) for early climb pace-setting then sacrifices them before finale. Insurance breakaway positioning when GC under threat. Limited high-mountain support in final kilometers.
terrain_preference: Steep punchy finishes suit him better than extended high-mountain slogs. Strong time trialist who can defend GC positions against the clock. Struggles on climbs requiring repeated accelerations or long-range bridging efforts.
vulnerability: Cannot respond when top GC riders accelerate hard (evidenced by inability to follow ROGLIČ). Lacks offensive firepower when isolated without teammates. Exposed when race becomes explosive rather than steady-state climbing.
key_patterns: Defensive GC rider: holds position rather than attacks, three Vuelta stages show reactive racing.
Strong time trialist: superior ITT execution defended podium under pressure versus YATES.
Early breakaway insurance: positioned in break when GC threatened, tactical safety net approach.
Finishes best without teammates: fourth twice without support, suggests self-sufficient climbing ability.
Reliable domestique background: protected EWAN when at Orica, shows tactical discipline and team-first mentality.
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 shows relegation to safety-net breakaway role rather than outright GC leader, suggesting diminished status since 2021 Vuelta podium
